name: Mailchimp
philosophy: Mailchimp's web presence is the marketing-platform-with-personality chrome — Cavendish Yellow (#ffe01b) as the brand voltage, the chimp mascot Freddie as the brand character, hand-illustrated quirky heroes, and a typography stack that pairs a serif display with a clean sans body. The atmosphere is warm, weird, and deliberately small-business-friendly.

design_language.motion_signature: Hand-illustrated quirky motion — Freddie the chimp blinks and gestures on idle, hand-drawn illustrations have subtle wiggle animations. Hover lift on cards is restrained. The motion is quirky-warm, never corporate-smooth.

trademark_signals: Cavendish Yellow (#ffe01b) — the brand's signature high-vis yellow on chrome
Freddie the chimp — the brand mascot, illustrated with quirky personality
Hand-illustrated heroes — quirky drawings of people, animals, and abstract scenes
Cooper Light serif display + clean sans body — distinctive type pairing
Small-business friendly tone — warm, weird, never enterprise-corporate
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace the hand-illustrated quirk with generic 3D renders — the illustration personality is brand
Don't sanitize Freddie the chimp — the mascot's quirky weirdness is brand
Don't drop the Cooper Light serif display — it is the signature pairing
Don't tint Cavendish Yellow — the specific saturated #ffe01b is brand
